scenes.prompt: Cinematic slow push-in on a phone showing a med-spa facial video feed. Gentle, smooth camera motion, soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field. Premium and calm. No on-screen text, no captions, no watermarks.
scenes.headline: From Scroll to Booked
scenes.subhead: The video-first way to book local pros.

bubbles.text: Loved your facial video — Saturday open?

scenes.prompt: Fast, upbeat montage feel: a person's thumb scrolling a vertical video feed of local service businesses, then tapping a purple Book button. Modern, bright, energetic. Vertical 9:16. No readable text on screen.
scenes.headline: Watch. Tap. Booked.
scenes.subhead: Real videos from real local pros near you.
